title: Mythos is Back, OpenAI Releases GPT 5.6, Apple’s Price Increases
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss major AI and tech industry developments including Anthropic's Mythos model, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release, government involvement in frontier AI access, cost pressures on frontier labs, and Apple's price increases. The conversation covers regulatory landscape, business model shifts toward cheaper alternatives, billing transparency issues, and market valuations.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy review recent AI and tech developments: Anthropic's Mythos model, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release, government involvement in frontier AI access, mounting cost pressures on frontier labs, and Apple's price increases. The discussion touches on the regulatory landscape, gating of model access, and business model shifts toward cheaper alternatives as cost optimization becomes central. It also addresses billing transparency issues and market valuations. Key threads include test-time compute economics and how frontier labs are managing the gap between capability and cost.
